_meta: OUR own cab IRs that OVERRIDE the Rocksmith-extracted mic-position table. Generated by tools/generate_real_cab_irs.py from the Real Cab parametric model (rb_core/cab_synth.py): datasheet-driven drivers + per-configuration enclosure physics + spec-sheet mic models, validated vs measured reference grids (see Cabs/CAB_MODELING_GUIDE.md). 100%% distributable — no third-party IRs. One entry per cab gear key; files derive as <ir_dir>/<mic>_<pos>.wav (ir_dir already includes the clone-named per-cab subfolder).
